name: 💙Vox.💔
description:

thank you to sophie-niemand and I<3basil for the request!!

now THIS, was fun to write. RadioStatic/RadioSilence is literally rotting my brain i think about it 24/7

limitless tag so you can get as angsty as you want, enemies to lovers tag if you end up giving in and wanting that happy ending (the one we’ll never get AUGHGHFIFH 😞😞)

! reminder ! please be specific when requesting a bot!! please state which character, sfw/nsfw, and the scenario. thank you!
